title: How Active Movers Disassembles and Reassembles Large Imported King-Sized Beds with Zero Missing Screws
excerpt: King bed disassembly reassembly: imported furniture, hardware labeling, Active Movers process, zero missing screws, large bed moving Addis Ababa.
content:
How Active Movers disassembles and reassembles large imported king-sized beds with zero missing screws

Imported king beds arrive with metric hardware, concealed brackets, and headboard taller than elevator—disassembly without system yields orphan screws and wobble forever. Active Movers king-bed protocol: photograph, bag, label, and torque map so reassembly at Bole penthouse matches factory stability with zero missing screws.

This guide explains professional king-sized bed disassembly and reassembly methodology.

Pre-disassembly survey

  • Identify bed system: platform, slat, storage hydraulic, four-poster.
  • Measure headboard diagonal versus elevator—hoist plan if fail.
  • Photo overall and each joint macro.
  • Manual pouch if retained—reference torque specs.

Hardware management system

Ziplock per component: HEADBOARD-L, FOOTBOARD-BRACKETS, SLAT-SET-A. Tape bag to disassembled panel with painter tape—never loose in truck pocket abyss. Duplicate common bolts spare bag if manufacturer provided.

Disassembly sequence

Remove mattress and base first—protect in bag. Headboard bolts last visible; hidden cam locks documented photo. Hydraulic storage beds: secure pistons per manual—strap moving parts. Wrap panels blanket edge protected—king panels nick doorframes easily.

Transport orientation

Panels vertical between mattresses; hardware bags taped inside headboard wrap client-visible. Screws never inside unmarked junk carton.

Reassembly at destination

Layout panels in room before bolt—orientation check. Assemble frame square—measure diagonal equal. Torque gradual not single gorilla tighten—strip threads. Slats evenly spaced; center support leg down on carpet or pad.

Quality check

Shake test gentle; no creak; mattress seated. Client walkthrough before crew leaves—missing screw hunt now not month later.

Client role

Retain manufacturer Allen key in personal bag—backup. Disclose imported odd brands at booking.

When DIY fails

Call reassembly visit—cheaper than new bed.

Conclusion

King bed moves end stable when every screw bags with its panel, photos precede bolts, and reassembly squares frame—Active Movers zero-missing-screw promise is labeling discipline, not luck.
author: Active Movers Team
